name: alexmskills-beta
description: Beta channel for alexmskills — unreleased and in-progress plugins. Unstable; expect breaking changes. Promote to the stable `alexmskills` marketplace when ready.

plugins.name: tune-repo
plugins.description: Audit and tighten a repo's CLAUDE.md and guardrails so Claude Code works faster and more accurately in it: verify CLAUDE.md against reality, tighten the verify loop, add missing static guardrails, cut permission friction.
